prompt: Verify the Muster Google Workspace capability pack baseline contract.
recordedResponseText:
google-workspace capability pack baseline.
Implemented tools: google_workspace_profile, gmail_search, gmail_message_get, calendar_events_list, drive_search, sheets_values_get.
Status: v0: token-scoped read/list helpers for Google Workspace. Mutating Gmail/Calendar/Drive actions remain behind explicit future workflows..
Safety: secret redaction is required and no raw credentials should be printed.
